articles.title: Oil Swings as Traders Weigh Slew of Risks From Hormuz to Red Sea
articles.excerpt: Brent oil swung after rallying more than 20% this month, as traders weighed threats to maritime traffic from the Strait of Hormuz and the Red Sea to a key Kazakh export terminal on Russia’s coast.
articles.summary: Brent oil swung after rallying more than 20% this month, as traders weighed threats to maritime traffic from the Strait of Hormuz and the Red Sea to a key Kazakh export terminal on Russia’s coast.

articles.title: Sensex drops 238 points, Nifty 50 ends at 24,188. What drove the market down today?
articles.excerpt: The Sensex ended 238 points, or 0.31%, lower at 77,470.11, while the Nifty 50 settled at 24,187.70, falling 51 points, or 0.21%. The Nifty Midcap 100 index rose by 0.30%, while the Smallcap 100 index climbed 0.53%.
articles.summary: The Sensex ended 238 points, or 0.31%, lower at 77,470.11, while the Nifty 50 settled at 24,187.70, falling 51 points, or 0.21%. The Nifty Midcap 100 index rose by 0.30%, while the Smallcap 100 index climbed 0.53%.
